name: example-review
goal: Demonstrate a minimal review-only local Claude orchestration flow.

sharedContext.summary: Use this file as a template for a lean review task that reads the tracked orchestration contract directly instead of adding an upstream analyst hop.
constraints: Keep work bounded to repository guidance and local scripts.
Do not edit TODO.md or ai/state files.

tasks.title: Review orchestration guidance
tasks.prompt: Read the orchestration guide and system spec directly. Review them for missing coordinator risks, conflict holes, or operational gaps, then propose one concrete follow-up.
